brief_title: Nivolumab in Patients With Advanced Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma
official_title: A Phase II of Study of Nivolumab in Patients With Advanced Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma

pmids.citation: Munhoz RR, Nader-Marta G, de Camargo VP, Queiroz MM, Cury-Martins J, Ricci H, de Mattos MR, de Menezes TAF, Machado GUC, Bertolli E, Barros M, de Souza CE, Franke F, Ferreira FO, Feher O, de Castro G Jr. A phase 2 study of first-line nivolumab in patients with locally advanced or metastatic cutaneous squamous-cell carcinoma.
